violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed box of single service cups on floor in pantry area.
Toilet facilities. — ---Observed toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed items in hand sink in dish room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles by refrigerator in food prep area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
